title: Oracle Event, By Name
description: Event frames that name a figure from YOUR world (audit batch D): {{who}} is filled by the composite from the active world's cast. Tags pick the pool by actor: p = person, f = faction, s = settlement.

entries.text: {{who}} acts while your back is turned: {table:solo/oracle/descriptor} {table:solo/oracle/action} {table:solo/oracle/theme}.
A message from {{who}} finds you, wherever you are: {table:solo/oracle/descriptor} {table:solo/oracle/action} {table:solo/oracle/theme}.
{{who}} needs something only you can provide: {table:solo/oracle/descriptor} {table:solo/oracle/action} {table:solo/oracle/theme}.
{{who}} moves against you — quietly, for now: {table:solo/oracle/descriptor} {table:solo/oracle/action} {table:solo/oracle/theme}.
{{who}} makes an offer it would be unwise to refuse: {table:solo/oracle/descriptor} {table:solo/oracle/action} {table:solo/oracle/theme}.
{{who}} is not where everyone believes them to be: {table:solo/oracle/descriptor} {table:solo/oracle/action} {table:solo/oracle/theme}.
Something is stirring in {{who}} — travelers speak of little else: {table:solo/oracle/descriptor} {table:solo/oracle/action} {table:solo/oracle/theme}.
The road to {{who}} is no longer safe: {table:solo/oracle/descriptor} {table:solo/oracle/action} {table:solo/oracle/theme}.
